reviews.review_description: I really liked playing this, it's so much fun and I really hope that there will be other levels  created in the future because it was so enjoyable!
So good for any age, just want more, lots more please. Pretty please, do we have to beg.
This game is so much FUN. It's entertaining, it makes you laugh and, surprisingly, it's a great ''shooting'' game!!! 10/10.

Fun easy and colourful 

Easy to learn and loved it 

Hope the game is longer then I think
I love everything but it did hurt my head

Saw this advertised on a sub online today and was pleasantly surprised by the gameplay. The art style and controls are great. It has a unique movement mechanic that works well for the game. It's a great little game that's definitely a must try.

reviews.review_title: Better than most paid VR games!
reviews.review_description: Fun, well made and just overall great adventure. Everything from music, dialogue and voice acting has been done well and popping stuff is fun! It is without a doubt better than almost any paid VR games I've played so far. Please make more games guys!
I love it. Nice, funny and the controles are perfect. What a such great game for kids and adults, and the best for motion sickness. This is a tru gem !

I played Pop Quest Adventure tonight and really enjoyed the game! It’s free on App Lab. The game is charming, fun, and relaxing. There is a story line and a mission. If you die, you don’t have to start over which I like. And, seems to be unlimited lives but I could be wrong. I will definitely play this game again. I recommend this game!

All of Pop Quest, from the visual design to the locomotion to the music and voice acting, come together to form a wonderfully fun package. This is one of the few experiences I feel safe showing to anyone, even VR rookies. I want more VR experiences like this.

I don't often go out of my way to review things but this was one of the BIGGEST Surprises in a free game!! Funny, fun to play, reliable mechanics, simple to learn, unique locomotion and so many more reasons to love it. I'd love to see how this translates into a feature length game and if it does I'll buy it DAY ONE!!

This was a nice surprise.  I thought it was gonna be a quick throwaway experience but actually was a well thought out short adventure.  Simple mechanics and puzzles with some laughter.  I hope a longer adventure comes from this developer!

I had no idea what to expect but boy I was pleasantly surprised how much fun and how polished this little gem turned out.  The graphics are very "nintendo", the story is charming, the humor is delightful... Everything about this game is a win - and it's free!

I was definitely a bit skeptical when I saw this game described as Nintendo inspired. However, you can really tell the developing team put in tons of effort into making a amusing script, custom sound effects, and a plot line. Its a standout from the proof of concept sandbox experiences. Heavily recommend anyone even marginally interested in platformers or waveshooters give this a try. It brought a smile to my face and I hope this concept is built on in the future.

Love the environments, art style, and humor. Sheryl the receptionist was a delightful surprise. I wasn't able to play for long because I'm not great at handling smooth motion, but I look forward to getting back into it!
If this becomes a full game in the future, I'm definitely buying it!

reviews.review_title: A demo worthy of becoming a full game.
reviews.review_description: This is an excellent example of how to turn a simple concept into an enjoyable VR experience. It's genuinely funny, well presented and cleverly designed. I hope it gets made into a full game, it would be an instant purchase for me!

reviews.review_title: Best example of a Comedic VR Experience
reviews.review_description:
Check out the full review by searching Lipnox VR on YouTube or clicking this link - https://youtu.be/w9ziygCgRAE

Pop Quest Adventure blew my popping mind, just kidding well kind of. So this is fantastic experience the perfectly blends comedy and gameplay in a way that truly maximizes the fun element of VR. You have propellers that you use to navigate and you have guns that you use to pop things and by things I mean almost everything, even the sun is pop able in this experience. The comedic lines by well voice acted characters are the highlight for me as there were several moments I couldn't hold back the laughter. Pop Quest Adventure is one of those VR games you take a glance and pass over on and I know this because I did exactly that, but once I played it I found that it was an incredibly fun and polished experience and while still only a demo I think Jake has more then proven this is a project that needs to reach its completion and I strongly urge everyone reading these words to add this to your headset and give it a play. It wont cost you a cent and if you had a good time like I did leave the developer a review and let other people know about this amazing hidden gem.
This was an amazing game💯
I love this game its a short little adventure with so much going on. All the characters are so cute along with the enviroment. I love you can pop more or less anything in it.
